# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.
# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.
the_sahel_trade = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	icon = trade_caravans

	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		original_capital ?= {
			OR = {
				sub_continent = sub_continent:west_africa
				region = region:maghreb_region
			}
		}
	}

	requires = slave_raiding_wars
	trade_land_efficiency = medium_trade_land_efficiency_bonus
	allow_tributary_subject = yes
}

skilled_cavalry_raids = {
	age = age_1_traditions

	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		original_capital ?= { sub_continent = sub_continent:west_africa }
	}

	army_light_cavalry_power = 0.1

	requires = nomadic_tendencies
}
